author: Robby Sneiderman
name: SwiGLU + EMA + Sequential TTT + Memorization Analysis (Non-Record)
blurb: SwiGLU MLP, EMA, int5 quantization, sequential score-then-train TTT (3 epochs). Reports sliding-window BPB on TTT-adapted weights (1.0476) rather than TTT-loop BPB (1.1032) based on memorization analysis showing multi-epoch TTT overfits at higher epoch counts. Includes EBLS gamma convergence findings.
